---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa-by-year.csl
nocite: |
  @padilla2026multilevel, @padilla2025socioeconomic, @padilla2023evaluacion, @padilla2023seguimiento
---

::: {.section-title}
Selected Publications
:::

A selection of my work is listed below. For a complete list of publications and full-text access, visit my <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Bladimir-Padilla-2" target="_blank">ResearchGate profile</a>.

::: {#refs}
:::

::: {.section-title}
Thesis
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Master's thesis
**Padilla, B.** (2025). *Conflated Random Slopes in Multilevel Analysis*. University of Iowa.

[<a href="padilla2025_maThesis.pdf" target="_blank">Download PDF</a>]
:::
